strassenname.label: Straßenname
strassenname.description: A string value not longer than 4000 characters (or `null`/`None`).

stadtteil.label: Stadtteil/Bezirk
stadtteil.description: A string value not longer than 4000 characters (or `null`/`None`).

strassentyp.label: Straßentyp
strassentyp.description:
One selected option of multiple available options (or `null`/`None`).

The available options are defined in the `lookup_data` attribute of this control.

The field value will be the key in this `lookup_data` attribute (or `null`/`None`).

Displayed as single-select field in HTML pages.

notizen.label: Zusätzliche Notizen
notizen.description: A string value that can contain multiple lines of text (or `null`/`None`).

telefon.label: Telefon
telefon.description: A valid telephone number (or `null`/`None`). Might include country prefix and should include area code.

foto.label: Foto (optional)
foto.description:
An uploaded file (or `null`/`None`).

The field value will be the URL to download the file in the form `https://my.living-apps.de/files/69a95045c0c7650f1a2b48e5/data/<record-id>/<control-identifier>/<internal-id>` (or `null`/`None`).

vorname.label: Vorname
vorname.description: A string value not longer than 4000 characters (or `null`/`None`).

nachname.label: Nachname
nachname.description: A string value not longer than 4000 characters (or `null`/`None`).

strasse_auswahl.label: Straße
strasse_auswahl.description:
A reference to a LivingApp record from the target lookup app 'Straßenverzeichnis' with the id `69a950402ada32cf440e589b` (or `null`/`None`).

The field value will be a valid record URL in the form `https://my.living-apps.de/rest/apps/69a950402ada32cf440e589b/<record-id>` (or `null`/`None`).

Displayed as single-select field in HTML pages.

position_beschreibung.label: Position (Hausnummer/Bereich)
position_beschreibung.description: A string value not longer than 4000 characters (or `null`/`None`).

gps_koordinaten.label: Standort
gps_koordinaten.description:
A geographical location consisting of latitude, longitude and additional information (or `null`/`None`).

The field value will be an object with the keys `lat` (latitude as decimal degrees),
`long` (longitude as decimal degrees) and `info` (additional information as a string).

For example: `{"lat": 51.313056, "long": -0.601944, "info": "Woking, Woking Borough, Surrey, England"}`.

art_des_schadens.label: Art des Schadens
art_des_schadens.description:
One selected option of multiple available options (or `null`/`None`).

The available options are defined in the `lookup_data` attribute of this control.

The field value will be the key in this `lookup_data` attribute (or `null`/`None`).

Displayed as single-select field in HTML pages.

A geographical location consisting of latitude, longitude and additional information (or `null`/`None`).

The field value will be an object with the keys `lat` (latitude as decimal degrees),

The field value will be the URL to download the file in the form `https://my.living-apps.de/files/69a950448f0cebf4f85d78ee/data/<record-id>/<control-identifier>/<internal-id>` (or `null`/`None`).

meldedatum.label: Meldedatum
meldedatum.description:
A calendar date consisting of year, month and day (or `null`/`None`)

The field value will be a string in the format `<YYYY>-<MM>-<DD>` (or `null`/`None`).

For example: `2000-02-29`.
